content: Phase 1: Setup environment and install dependencies
Phase 1: Create comprehensive POC test script (OpenAI + WebSocket + Stripe + ELO)
Phase 1: Run and fix POC until all tests pass
Phase 1: All user stories covered in POC testing

Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development and testing
